name: Carroll County Christian Academy
description: Come play pickleball at Carroll County Christian Academy in Carrollton, OH! There are 2 indoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are private.

name: Carrollton Elementary School
description: Come play pickleball at Carrollton Elementary School in Carrollton, OH! There are 2 indoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are private.

name: Damascus Friends Church
description: Damascus Friends Church is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Malvern, OH. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: First Christian Church of Malvern
description: First Christian Church of Malvern is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Malvern, OH. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Malvern Village Park
description: Malvern Village Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Malvern, OH. There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to restrooms. The court is free.
